codeReview.summary: The regression fix is fully covered. `Button.vue` now only applies the fallback loading label when the button is loading and has neither visible text nor a caller-provided `aria-label`, so text buttons keep their accessible name while icon-only or empty buttons still announce loading.

summary: Reviewed `src/components/ui/Button.vue`, `src/components/ui/Button.test.ts`, the worker handoff/transcript, the `ui-worker` skill, and commit `3a5deae795cdc2b435dcba653f315358d6d6219a`. The implementation matches the feature contract and the targeted tests cover both key regression paths: loading buttons with visible text keep their accessible name, while loading buttons without visible text receive the fallback `aria-label="加载中"`.
